common.tagline: Life Operating System for Solo Founders and Duos

tasks.count: {count, plural, =0 {No tasks} one {# task} other {# tasks}}

status.error: Couldn't save. Check your connection and try again.

hero.title: Run your life like a founder runs a company.
hero.subtitle: One calm place that connects today's effort to the life you said you would build — vision, goals, deep work, reflection.

obt.title: One Big Thing
obt.body: One task is the center of your day. Everything else can wait.

identity.title: Identity-based habits
identity.body: Not streak theatre. You are what you repeat — Apex keeps the proof.

focus.title: Cinema-mode deep work
focus.body: The room goes quiet, the ring counts down, momentum compounds.

offline.title: Offline-first & private
offline.body: Works without a connection. EU-hosted. Your data is yours.

pricing.title: Honest pricing. No tricks.
pricing.subtitle: Free is a real start, not a trap. Annual saves about 30 percent.
pricing.note: Prices incl. VAT where applicable. Cancel anytime.

auth.signUpTitle: Build the life you said you would.
auth.comingSoon: Connected to Supabase — sessions on this site are isolated until Phase 13 deployment (ADR 0013).
auth.legalHint: By continuing you accept our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
auth.successSignIn: Signed in. The app handoff goes live with deployment (Phase 13).
auth.successConfirm: Check your inbox to confirm your email.
auth.successReset: If the address exists, a reset link is on its way.

legal.draft: DRAFT — placeholder. Lawyer-reviewed version required before public launch (see ADR 0010).
legal.imprintBody: Information according to § 5 TMG. Operator: [FULL NAME], [STREET], [ZIP CITY], Germany. Contact: [EMAIL]. VAT ID: [PENDING].
legal.privacyBody: This privacy policy will be generated with e-recht24 and reviewed by a lawyer before launch. Data residency: EU (Frankfurt). No ads, no tracking without consent.
legal.termsBody: Terms of service will be drafted from a B2C SaaS template and reviewed by a lawyer before launch.

notFound.title: Nothing here.
notFound.body: The page does not exist — back to what matters.

auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.confirmationSent: Check your inbox — confirm your email to continue.
auth.resetSent: If the address exists, a reset link is on its way.
auth.brandPitch: Apex connects what you do today with the person you're becoming.

onboarding.welcomeTitle: You did not come here to manage tasks.
onboarding.welcomeBody: Apex connects what you do today to the person you are becoming. Five minutes now sets the frame. You can skip anything — and add it later.
onboarding.consent: I accept the Terms of Service and the Privacy Policy.
onboarding.identitySubtitle: This shapes how Apex speaks to you. One choice — change it anytime.

founder.label: The Solo Founder
founder.desc: Building a company alone, betting on yourself.

creator.label: The Creator
creator.desc: Shipping work into the world, on your terms.

athlete.label: The Self-Athlete
athlete.desc: Training body and mind like a craft.

onboarding.workspaceSubtitle: And pick the colour you want to live in.
onboarding.visionSubtitle: Not a goal. The horizon goals point at. Skip if it's not ready.
onboarding.visionTitlePh: e.g. A calm, profitable company I'm proud of
onboarding.visionStatementPh: In three years, I am someone who…
onboarding.goalSubtitle: One 90-day goal that bends the vision closer.
onboarding.goalTitlePh: e.g. Ship Apex Alpha and use it daily
onboarding.habitSubtitle: A habit is identity in motion. Start with one.
onboarding.habitIdentityPh: I am someone who learns every day
onboarding.obtTitle: What is the one thing today?
onboarding.obtSubtitle: Not your list. The single thing that matters most today.
onboarding.completeBody: Vision, goal, habit, today's focus — all in place. Now the only question left is the daily one.
onboarding.workspaceTypeLegend: Just you or two of you
